navigation.siteDescription: Reusable showcase website starter for product or service presentation.

footer.description: Reusable showcase website starter for products, services, proof, and inquiry paths.

hero.title: Present products, applications, and delivery proof in one clear B2B website.
hero.subtitle: Use this starter to organize product families, application fit, proof points, and inquiry paths before a real company replaces the example content.

preview.label: Buyer evaluation map
preview.title: A clearer path from product fit to inquiry
preview.description: The first screens help buyers understand what is offered, where it fits, what supports delivery, and how to prepare the next request.

problems.title: B2B buyers need proof close to each claim.
problems.description: The first screens should help a buyer judge product fit, application fit, and delivery confidence before they decide to contact the company.

structure.title: Product fit
structure.description: Show product families, service lines, and detail paths so visitors can see whether the offer covers their need.

content.title: Application fit
content.description: Connect the offer to use cases, operating constraints, and buyer questions instead of only showing generic cards.

deployment.title: Delivery confidence
deployment.description: Place response paths, standards, workflow, and proof slots near the claims they support.

inquiry.title: Inquiry readiness
inquiry.description: Make the next step clear so a buyer knows what to review before sending a request.

multilingual.title: Multilingual review
multilingual.description: Keep English and Chinese copy parallel so international buyers see the same decision path.

answer.title: The starter turns those buyer questions into reusable website sections.
answer.description: It keeps the first screens focused on products, applications, delivery proof, and inquiry next steps while leaving every example easy to replace.

pageStructure.title: Product system sections
pageStructure.description: Use categories, overview cards, detail pages, and resource links to explain the offer without building a product tile wall.

replacementSurface.title: Application story sections
replacementSurface.description: Use scenarios, constraints, and fit notes to show where the product or service belongs.

inquiryPath.title: Delivery and quality proof
inquiryPath.description: Use response paths, standards, workflow notes, and evidence slots without inventing fake customers or certifications.

cloudflareFoundation.title: Inquiry path
cloudflareFoundation.description: Keep contact and product routes connected so evaluation can turn into a prepared inquiry.

startPath.title: A practical path from starter to public launch.
startPath.description: Use this demo as the beginning of the site, then replace the parts that must belong to the real owner.

brand.title: Replace brand facts
brand.description: Company name, domain, logo, colors, contact details, and legal identity become real owner-confirmed facts.

content.title: Replace page content
content.description: Home, product or service copy, proof assets, blog guidance, images, and legal pages become real launch content.

forms.title: Connect forms
forms.description: Contact submissions, email delivery, anti-abuse checks, and response ownership point to real accounts.

deploy.title: Deploy and verify
deploy.description: Cloudflare preview, form canary, traffic visibility, and owner signoff prove readiness separately from local checks.

starterBoundary.title: This demo looks finished because the starter should prove the launch path.
starterBoundary.description: The public demo shows a complete website shape while keeping the replacement work visible before a real business uses it.

items.title: Replace the business identity
items.description: Company name, domain, contact details, legal body, logo, and social links must become owner-confirmed facts.

items.title: Replace the offer story
items.description: Products, services, proof, images, and response promises must match the real business.

items.title: Connect the lead path
items.description: Inquiry forms, email, Airtable or CRM destinations, Turnstile, and canary checks must use the real environment.

items.title: Prove the deployment
items.description: Cloudflare build, preview smoke, dashboard credentials, and owner signoff stay separate from local test results.

chain.title: From Content to Inquiry, One Reusable Flow.
chain.subtitle: The starter keeps content, components, review surfaces, and contact paths connected so each new website starts from a working base.

step1.title: Offer Review
step1.desc: Clarify what the new website needs to present before replacing example content

step2.title: Content Setup
step2.desc: Replace brand facts, offerings, proof, images, and conversion copy in the right source files

step3.title: Component Reuse
step3.desc: Use existing sections and Storybook previews before creating new UI

step4.title: Page Assembly
step4.desc: Build a complete site from reusable sections, translations, and page content

step5.title: Verification
step5.desc: Run brand, content, component, type, test, and build checks before launch

sample.title: Preview Before You Commit.
sample.description: Use the example pages and Storybook components to review structure, copy, and UI states before turning this into a real website.

scenarios.title: Where This Starter Fits
scenarios.subtitle: Reusable across product, service, and organization showcase websites. Replace these examples with real use cases.

item1.title: Product Showcase
item1.desc: Use cards, spec tables, resources, and inquiry CTAs to help visitors evaluate an offer quickly.
item1.quote: "Replace this with a real customer quote only after it is verified."

item2.title: Service Business
item2.desc: Explain process, deliverables, proof, and next steps without rebuilding the page system.
item2.quote: "Use this area for a real service result, testimonial, or case note."

item3.title: Custom Project
item3.desc: Show discovery, proposal, configuration, approval, and delivery steps for tailored work.
item3.quote: "Add real project proof here after the new site has evidence."

quality.title: Our Commitments
quality.subtitle: Starter-level promises that should be replaced with real business commitments before launch.

commitment1.title: Clear Response Window
commitment1.desc: State the real response time visitors can expect after submitting an inquiry.

commitment2.title: Verified Proof Only
commitment2.desc: Replace placeholder claims with evidence your real project can support.

commitment3.title: Reusable Page System
commitment3.desc: Keep page sections modular so future AI work can reuse them safely.

commitment4.title: Simple Contact Path
commitment4.desc: Keep the primary inquiry path visible and easy to complete.

commitment5.title: Replaceable Content
commitment5.desc: Keep example content useful for preview, but clearly replace it before a real launch.

proofStrip.note: Use this proof strip only for verified certifications, references, and project evidence in a real website.

finalCta.title: Start from a real website foundation, then replace what must become yours.
finalCta.description: Review what the starter includes, or use the contact route as the quick path for the next real setup conversation.
finalCta.trust: Example response promise · Replace proof before launch · {countries}+ placeholder markets

about.title: {siteName}
about.desc: A replaceable showcase website starter for presenting offers, proof, resources, and inquiry paths.

cta.message: Contact us for samples or technical support

techStack.title: Technology Stack
techStack.subtitle: Built with cutting-edge technologies for enterprise-grade performance and scalability.

technologies.pnpm: Fast, disk space efficient package manager
technologies.sonarqube: Code quality and security analysis platform

showcase.title: Component Showcase
showcase.subtitle: Explore our comprehensive UI component library with live examples and interactive demos.

buttons.title: Button Components
buttons.description: Various button styles and sizes for different use cases.

forms.title: Form Components
forms.description: Input fields and form controls with validation support.
forms.name: Full Name

interactive.title: Interactive Elements
interactive.description: Buttons and controls with dynamic behavior and state management.

badges.title: Badge Components
badges.description: Status indicators and labels for various content types.

themes.title: Theme System
themes.description: Dynamic theme switching with light and dark mode support.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.description: Optimized layouts for all device sizes and screen resolutions.

mobile.title: Mobile First
mobile.description: Optimized for mobile devices with touch-friendly interfaces.

tablet.title: Tablet Ready
tablet.description: Perfect layout adaptation for tablet screens and orientations.

desktop.title: Desktop Enhanced
desktop.description: Full-featured desktop experience with advanced interactions.

overview.title: Starter Capabilities
overview.subtitle: A reusable website base with content ownership, component governance, visual review, and deployment checks.

performance.title: Content Ownership
performance.description: Brand facts, page prose, and shared UI text each have a clear editing surface.

security.title: Quality Checks
security.description: Validation commands help catch broken content, translations, components, types, tests, and builds.

i18n.title: Multilingual Ready
i18n.description: The starter includes English and Chinese content paths with translation validation.

themes.title: Customizable Sections
themes.description: Homepage, about, product/service, custom project, contact, privacy, and terms pages are ready to adapt.

typescript.title: Design Tokens
typescript.description: Color, spacing, and component rules keep UI changes easier for AI to manage.

deployment.title: Deployment Path
deployment.description: Next.js, Cloudflare/OpenNext, Turnstile, email, and form basics stay wired for later replacement.

highlights.title: Core Capabilities
highlights.subtitle: What makes this starter easier for future AI-assisted website work.

frontend.title: Product Example
frontend.description: Replaceable catalog pages, cards, specs, and inquiry CTAs for product-led websites.

ui.title: Service Example
ui.description: Reusable structure for explaining process, deliverables, proof, and next steps.

tooling.title: Custom Project Example
tooling.description: A structured page for project scope, collaboration steps, quality review, and intake.

cta.title: Ready to Adapt This Starter?
cta.description: Replace the example identity, offerings, proof, content, images, and deployment settings for a real website.

home.title: Showcase Website Starter
home.subtitle: Reusable Showcase Website Starter
home.description: Reusable website starter for product, service, proof, and inquiry presentation.
home.modernApp: A modern web application built with Next.js 16 and React 19

performance.title: High Performance
performance.description: Optimized for speed and efficiency with modern web technologies.

scalable.title: Scalable Architecture
scalable.description: Built to grow with your business needs and requirements.
